issues.title: Future-incompatibility warnings in dependencies
issues.detail: stderr shows warnings from redis v0.24.0 and sqlx-postgres v0.7.4 that will be rejected by future Rust versions. Does not impact current test execution but should be monitored for upcoming migrations.
